variants: Throughout her career, Antonella Greco has shown a robust dedication to community service and nutrition education. A native of Thorncove Village, she honed her skills at Elmspire Institute, where she discovered her passion for nutrition. Currently, she contributes to Ironforge Bioworks, leveraging her expertise to promote health and wellbeing. Moreover, Antonella is a committed member of Nutrition Educator Mangrove Pines, a civic or volunteer organization that emphasizes the importance of healthy dietary practices. Fluent in the Cantonese dialect, she engages with a diverse range of individuals, further enhancing her outreach efforts.
